description: Thresholds for the Chainalysis sanctions / address-screening gate

deny_on_sanctioned.description: Deny when the public Sanctions Screening API returns any identification for the address

deny_on_high_risk_category.description: Deny when the Address Screening v2 risk enum is 'high' or 'severe' (requires CHAINALYSIS_SCREENING_KEY)

risk_categories_blocklist.description: Lowercased category strings that, if any are present in the screening response, deny the deposit (e.g. ['mixer','stolen_funds','ransomware'])
